name: healthcare-data-mcp
description: Local MCP access to public healthcare market intelligence: facilities, ownership, quality, claims, workforce, research, and compliance screening.
long_description: Runs one selected healthcare-data-mcp server over stdio for Claude Desktop. Choose from focused servers for CMS facilities, service areas, demographics, drive times, quality, health systems, finance, price transparency, referrals, workforce, claims, public records, web intelligence, provider enrollment, community health, and research trials. Optional API keys can be entered through the desktop extension configuration UI.

server_name.title: Healthcare Data MCP server
server_name.description: Server to run: cms-facility, service-area, geo-demographics, drive-time, hospital-quality, health-system-profiler, financial-intelligence, price-transparency, physician-referral-network, workforce-analytics, claims-analytics, public-records, web-intelligence, discovery, gateway, live-gateway, provider-enrollment, community-health, or research-trials.

SAM_GOV_API_KEY.title: SAM.gov API key
SAM_GOV_API_KEY.description: Required for SAM.gov Exclusions and opportunity tools. Leave blank to use tools that do not require SAM.gov.

CHPL_API_KEY.title: ONC CHPL API key
CHPL_API_KEY.description: Optional enrichment for public-records EHR certification lookups.

SEC_USER_AGENT.title: SEC EDGAR User-Agent
SEC_USER_AGENT.description: Required for financial-intelligence SEC EDGAR tools. Use an app name and real contact email.

CENSUS_API_KEY.title: Census API key
CENSUS_API_KEY.description: Optional key for Census-backed geo-demographics tools.

HUD_API_TOKEN.title: HUD API token
HUD_API_TOKEN.description: Optional token for HUD ZIP crosswalk tools.

BLS_API_KEY.title: BLS API key
BLS_API_KEY.description: Optional key for workforce analytics rate limits.

GOOGLE_CSE_ID.title: Google Custom Search Engine ID
GOOGLE_CSE_ID.description: Optional CSE ID used with GOOGLE_CSE_API_KEY.
